chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الْمِرَاءِ وَ الْخُصُومَةِ وَ مُعَادَاةِ الرِّجَالِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 120 – The quarreling, and the disputing, and the animosity to the men

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/138)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/138)
text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) لَا تُمَارِيَنَّ حَلِيماً وَ لَا سَفِيهاً فَإِنَّ الْحَلِيمَ يَقْلِيكَ وَ السَّفِيهَ يُؤْذِيكَ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from Salih Bin Al Sindy, from Ja’far Bin Bashir, from Ammar Bin Marwan who said,
‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Do not quarrel with a forbearing one nor with a foolish one, for the forbearing one would detest you and the foolish one would harm you’.
en.sarwar: 4. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from Salih ibn al-Sindy from Ja’far ibn Bashir from ‘Ammar ibn Marwan who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) has said, ‘Do not engage in a disputation against either a forbearing or a thoughtless person; a forbearing person turns into your foe and a thoughtless person will hurt you.’”
